model_specification_line: smf.wls("full_time ~ DACA_eligible + C(statefip) + C(year)", data=df, weights=df["perwt"])
sample_selection: hispan == 1 and bpl == 200 and citizen == 3 (Mexican-born noncitizen population)
birthyr between 1980 and 1999 with birthqtr 1-4 and yrimmig > 0 (DACA-age immigrant cohort with positive weights)
treatment_definition: DACA_eligible = ((birthyr > 1981) or (birthyr == 1981 and birthqtr >= 3)) and (yrimmig <= birthyr + 15) and (yrimmig <= 2007) and (citizen == 3)
